svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TB subgraph "Bibliograph Core" BSB["BibliographStorageBase
(write/delete logic, metadata, deltas)"] end subgraph "Built-in" BSFS["BibliographStorageFS
(JSON files on disk)"] end subgraph "External Providers" BSM["bibliograph-storage-meadow
(SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL)"] BSL["bibliograph-storage-lmdb"] BSLDB["bibliograph-storage-leveldb"] BSR["bibliograph-storage-rocksdb"] end BSB --> BSFS BSB --> BSM BSB --> BSL BSB --> BSLDB BSB --> BSR ","style":"notebook"}
